name: Dixie Gold Inc.
summary: Dixie Gold Inc. engages in the exploration and development of mineral resource properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for uranium, gold, and lithium deposits. Its principal properties include the Preston Uranium project situated in Western Athabasca Basin; the Red Lake gold project that comprises approximately 25,269 hectares across 1,241 mining claims located in Ontario; the Isko gold project situated in the Windfall Lake/Urban-Barry gold district, Quebec; the Torp Lake lithium project covering 1,003 hectares located in Nunavut; and the Phoenix Lithium project that consists of seven mineral claims covering 5,629 hectares located in the Northwest Territories. The company was formerly known as Clean Commodities Corp. and changed its name to Dixie Gold Inc. in October 2019. Dixie Gold Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
